question.label: Next quarter ownership
question.name: You said 'owning next quarter' feels unclear — what feels most uncertain there?
question.description: Drills into the ownership uncertainty she just named to locate the specific clarity gap.

answer: I have felt a bit stuck doing similar work for months.

assessment.note: She answered an ownership-uncertainty probe with a months-long sense of being stuck in similar work, which signals a strong unresolved clarity gap about what comes next.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would you want more of from me right now?

new_queue.label: Next-two-weeks focus
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel smoother for you?

history.answer_excerpt: The launch went well, but this week I feel flatter than I expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.
I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
I have felt a bit stuck doing similar work for months.
